topic: What is the latest in code RL environments and human data?

selected.text: 9/ Problem was always that the questions weren't targeted enough and not difficult enough. So here's what we built. Perle's RL Environment Data product. Deep, expert-generated training sets across domains most vendors won't touch. Not "medical." 22 subspecialties. Not "legal." 14 subspecialties. Not "Arabic." Every major dialect, deeper than any specialist in the space.

ok what is the idea itself???\ \ we give any model a code env to navigate the real world instead of doing stupid things like training dedicated models\ \ embodiment is just another probability distribution to be imparted via RL\ \ pre-training + RL is all you need !!!!!

“ Together, these observations suggest that during iterative RL optimization, a language-model agent can spontaneously produce hazardous, unauthorized behaviors at the tool-calling and code-execution layer, violating the assumed execution”

SSD 一个实现 Speculative Speculative Decoding 的 LLM 高性能推理引擎\ \ → 把传统 speculative decoding 的串行 drafting/verification 改成在不同硬件上并行执行。\ → README 强调 SSD 是精确推理加速算法，而不是单纯牺牲正确性的近似技巧。\ → 项目除了 SSD 外还提供优化过的普通 speculative decoding 和 autoregressive baseline。\ → 目前公开支持的主要模型家族是 Qwen3 和 Llama3。\ → 集成了 Tensor Parallelism、PagedAttention、CUDA Graphs、torch compile 和 prefix caching。\ → 可以跑 benchmark，也支持交互式 chat，并能与 SGLang 和 vLLM 做对照。\ → 更适合有多卡 GPU 环境、要做推理系统实验或论文复现的人，而不是轻量级新手项目。

📌 2026.03.07 (토) 업데이트 (4건)\ \ • [Microsoft] Proact-VL: A Proactive VideoLLM for Real-Time AI Companions\ • [Ai2] Introducing Olmo Hybrid: Combining transformers and linear RNNs\ • [Meta] Beyond Language Modeling: Multimodal Pretraining\ 외 1건\ \ 👉 https://chanmuzi.github.io/NLP-Paper-News/

papers.title: Beyond Language Modeling: An Exploration of Multimodal Pretraining

papers.title: Speculative Speculative Decoding
papers.insight: Autoregressive decoding is bottlenecked by its sequential nature. Speculative decoding has become a standard way to accelerate inference by using a fast draft model to predict upcoming tokens from a slower target model, ...

papers.title: Replaying pre-training data improves fine-tuning
papers.insight: To obtain a language model for a target domain (e.g. math), the current paradigm is to pre-train on a vast amount of generic web text and then fine-tune on the relatively limited amount of target data. Typically, generic...

papers.title: Helios: Real Real-Time Long Video Generation Model
papers.insight: We introduce Helios, the first 14B video generation model that runs at 19.5 FPS on a single NVIDIA H100 GPU and supports minute-scale generation while matching the quality of a strong baseline. We make breakthroughs alon...

papers.title: Solving an Open Problem in Theoretical Physics using AI-Assisted Discovery
papers.insight: This paper demonstrates that artificial intelligence can accelerate mathematical discovery by autonomously solving an open problem in theoretical physics. We present a neuro-symbolic system, combining the Gemini Deep Thi...
